programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria is furious with Liam for selling his share of the factory without consulting her, Teresa gives Jerry a sob story about her violent boyfriend, Tony joins Underworld and becomes Carlas business partner, and.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: A petty thief makes several attacks in the area, including terrifying Gina and injuring Maggie. At least, a Bob Dylan look a like arrives and entertains everyone with his music.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: While celebrating Katies christening, Nick receives a visit from an old girlfriend of his to inform him that they will be investigate the criminal activities of the owner of a well known gambling club.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: The aftermath of ACC Cassian Pewes betrayal hangs heavily over East Sussex Police several months on as Graces team is in the midst of an anti-corruption enquiry while Roy wrestles with whether to trust Cassians intel about Sandys murder and the threat to Brunos life - his team is plunged into a case filled with secrets after Eden, the wife of Brighton property developer Neel, is reported missing by her distraught husband.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Banks and his team are called on to investigate the murder of teenager Ellie Clayton, daughter of an internet entrepreneur. The high profile of the victims family, coupled with the suggestion that she had also been raped, means that there is intense media speculation about the case. There is strong evidence implicating Owen Pierce, a local theatre director who ran the workshop that Ellie attended on the night she died.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: The collapse of Owen Pierces trial has left the case wide open and a killer still on the loose. Banks sets out to collect watertight evidence against Pierce, who is still his prime suspect, but Morton tries to persuade him to keep an open mind. Then promising new information leading to Tyler Judd comes to light, and it looks as if the team might finally be closer to the truth behind Ellie Claytons murder.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a middle-aged Oxford graduate is found murdered, Lewis and Hathaway launch an investigation which implicates one of the universitys most prominent figures. They discover both he and the victim were former members of a hedonistic undergraduate group, and when the would-be Vice Chancellor is also found dead, Lewis and Hathaway find themselves trawling through Ancient Greek clues to find the killer.

After catching some smaller specimens, they crack the tactics and bait code, but will they bank that illusive 30lber before the end of the trip?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Leyland, Simon finds three battered car seats to transform into a three-piece suite. And Henry picks up an overhead light which he repurposes into a fashionable light box.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Southport, Henry finds some ammunition crates which he wants to turn into furniture, while Simon discovers a light from Southport Pier which he wants to upcycle into a table.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Four proud BandB owners do battle to be named the best value for money. The competition kicks off at Greenways of Malvern in Worcestershire, where Geri Atterbury likes to provide a home from home.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to The Royal Forester at Bewdley, Worcestershire, where couple Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker want to wow their guests.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Ferry Lodge in Holyhead, North Wales, where mother and son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway hope to give their guests their very best.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The last visit of the week is to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, where partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts have been running the family business for four years.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its the final day and the BandBers meet one last time to settle some scores and find out how much theyve been paid. After some hosting roasting and dust disputes, the winner is announced.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: New Zealander Steve Levy is first to host in Exeter and has gone to town with his home inspired menu, cooking prawns for his starter, fish for his main and not one, but two desserts.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Music-mad foodie Richard Kaye is second to host in Exeter and is confident he can impress his guests with his culinary know-how. He especially hopes to dazzle one guest in particular: Estelle Macrow.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Self-assured PR bod Glen King is confident she will be the `hostess with the mostest in Exeter, and has gone all out to impress, even co-ordinating her dishes with her surname.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Exeter, Sarah Wallis has been holding back, allowing her fellow diners to have their time in the sun. Tonight she is ready to explode out of her shell with a silly but hilarious evening including some rather unusual cocktails.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night in Exeter and singleton Estelle Macrow is keen to discover whether she has it in her to successfully host a dinner party.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Hazels Roost in Bainbridge, Yorkshire, Lithuanian-raised host Millie Bussey hopes her years working on cruise ships will mean the competition is all plain sailing.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit this week is to Llanymynech in Wales, where at Rhandregynwen Hall even host Mark Johannsen and his friend Amos Bell are stumped by the BandBs name.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Smart and Simple hotel in Tunbridge Wells, Kent. Owner Simon Colbran and his assistant manager Rebecca Heasman want their rivals to agree that `the rooms are smart, and thats simple.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Pearfield BandB in Petersfield, where owner Cathy Robinson and her son Alex want to win over their guests with a home from home experience.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its the final day, and the BandBers meet for the last time to discuss their feedback forms and see how much theyve been paid. With low scoring and hurt feelings, theres plenty of tension before the winner is revealed.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are in Surrey, one of the UKs most expensive counties. Kirstie assists Lauren in Guildford, while Phil helps Eleanor and Laurence find the good life in Surbiton.

programme.desc: Phil revisits Sarah and Ian, whose two-bed semi in Northamptonshire was bursting at the seams. Five years on, Phil finds out if they followed through on their decision.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Does good architecture have the power to heal? Kevin revisits Elinor and Born, who in 2017 built a clean-aired, hypoallergenic house, motivated by the extreme allergies of their two boys.

programme.desc: IT project manager Robert, whos 37, was travelling to work on his motorbike when he collided with a car. Robert is confused and has injuries to his face and head, so hes taken straight for a CT scan to assess their severity.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Charulata, whos 59, is rushed to AandE after collapsing at home with signs of a stroke, and medics send her for a CT scan. While they wait for results, her husband Dilip talks about meeting his wife and running a corner shop together in Tooting.

programme.desc: For four seasons fans of `Teen Mom watched Farrah, Maci, Amber and Catelynn face multiple challenges in their first years of motherhood, including such things as graduating from high school, relationships, getting jobs, beginning college and moving out on their own. Oh, and raising their first child. Now the original girls - hence, the `OG in the revived series title - return to reveal the challenges of raising children on camera, and how life in the public eye has shaped them as parents and people. programme.sub-title: West of Skyfall: Skye, Soay and Canna
programme.desc: For this grand tour Pauls journey begins at Loch Hourn on the mainland, takes him over the sea to the to Skye, then heads to thetiny island of Soay before finishing on Canna. Along the way, Paul visits the house which was the inspiration for Skyfall, home ofBritains most famous spy, James Bond, embarks on a nerve wracking caving expedition under the summit of Blaven, anddiscovers the remarkable story of shark fishing off Soay.

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Following the cancellation of the first trial, the second begins. The defence seems to have changed its strategy. Will this new jury acquit Moochie?

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: Two years after a 13-year-old girl was taken from her home, her skull is found.

programme.title: Catch My Killer
programme.desc: A missing girl, 16, is found dead.

programme.title: Infamous Crime Scenes: OJ
programme.desc: Turn back the clock and uncover the truth behind the OJ Simpson trial.

programme.title: Who Killed Lt. Van Dorn?
programme.desc: The wife of the late Lt Wes Van Dorn seeks an explanation of her husbands death after the helicopter he was piloting crashes off the coast of Virginia.

programme.title: Fred and Rose West: Love and Murder
programme.desc: Fred and Rose West raped, tortured and murdered at least a dozen young British girls between 1967 and 1987, including several of their own daughters. Learn how two of Britains most notorious serial killers were able to get away with their crimes for so long, how they hid the victims remains within the confines of their own home, and how they were eventually taken down.

programme.title: Murderous Minds: Rose West
programme.desc: Rosemary Pauline West is an English serial killer who collaborated with her husband, Fred West, in the torture and murder of at least nine young women between 1973 and 1987. She also murdered her eight-year-old stepdaughter, Charmaine, in 1971. Delve into the psychology of Rose to try and understand what turned her into such a cruel rapist and murderer.

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Jill Halliburton is murdered and police arrest a black man nicknamed Moochie. However, the testimony of the victims son raises questions. Distressing scenes.

programme.title: Moochie: Who Killed Jill Halliburton?
programme.desc: Following Moochies escape, the police organise a massive manhunt as supporters of the fugitive amongst the Black community make their voice heard.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Louise investigates a case, looking for evidence that could present grounds to bring an appeal, and ultimately overturn the conviction of a Southampton man in prison for the murder of his secret lover.

programme.title: Police, Camera, Murder
programme.desc: Unprecedented access reveals the critical role of digital forensics in modern murder investigations. A schoolboy is found stabbed in the street and an elderly pensioner has been tortured to death - can smartphone and CCTV analysis solve the crimes?

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Exploring Hindleys childhood and the start of her relationship with Brady.

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The stories of the victims and those who got away.

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story
programme.desc: A look at the life and crimes of infamous killer Myra Hindley. This film explores the stories of Brady and Hindleys five known murder victims and the accounts of the children who got away, most notably David Smith.

programme.title: Trevor McDonald and the Killer Nurse
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald investigates the case of serial child killer Beverley Allitt and reflects on how it was reported at the time. A combination of archive from the time, interviews with victims and expert analysis will piece together this tragic and shocking story.

programme.title: Murderous Minds: Harold Shipman
programme.desc: Harold Shipman was an English general practitioner and serial killer. He is considered to be one of the most prolific serial killers in modern history, with an estimated 250 victims.

programme.title: Angel of Death
programme.desc: As the number of deaths at a medical centre climbs, the night staff begins to suspect that someone is poisoning the patients.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder in Suburbia
programme.desc: Inside Justice investigate the conviction of Glyn Razzell, found guilty of his wifes murder. Glyn maintains his innocence, and now theres an alleged link with a double murderer.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Headlines are made for the sexual assault and murder of a British student in Italy. Housemate Amanda Knox and her boyfriend are suspected. Find out if prosecutors can keep them behind bars.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Following a team of experts as they investigate whether evidence exists that could challenge the conviction of a man in prison for a murder he denies. Every year, over 500 people in the UK are convicted of murder. A guilty verdict can only be challenged if new evidence comes to light. Inside Justice is a specialist charity led by Louise Shorter, supported by a panel of criminal lawyers, ex-police officers and forensics experts who offer assistance to prisoners who are protesting their innocence.

programme.title: Conviction: Murder at the Station
programme.desc: Louise investigates a case, looking for evidence that could present grounds to bring an appeal, and ultimately overturn the conviction of a Southampton man in prison for the murder of his secret lover.

programme.title: Police, Camera, Murder

programme.title: Myra Hindley: The Untold Story
programme.desc: Exploring Hindleys childhood and the start of her relationship with Brady.

programme.title: Wild Moments: Funny Encounters
programme.desc: Arctic crew battle storms, improvise shelter, and film playful wolves amid setbacks.

programme.title: Wild Moments: Funny Encounters
programme.desc: Japans Sugar Mago shows human-wildlife balance, from dragonflies to hot-spring monkeys.

programme.title: Wild Faces of Switzerland
programme.desc: Learn about four different regions of Switzerland. From the rugged mountains of the Ticino High Alps to the lovely Muggio Valley in the southernmost corner of Ticino, hardly any other canton is so full of contrasts.

programme.title: Wild Faces of Switzerland
programme.desc: The river called Aare is the only body of water that runs through Switzerland. It rises from a source in the Bernese Alps and finally flows into the Rhine. The Aare offers important habitat for flora and fauna.

programme.title: Cheetah: Beating the Odds
programme.desc: A cheetah raises her young family on the vast expanse of the Serengeti, facing enormous challenges. Lions are quick to throw their muscle around, and hyenas and jackals attempt to steal anything the cheetah manages to kill.

programme.title: Jaguar: King of the Jungle
programme.desc: The jaguar is the third largest of the big cats, and pound for pound, the most powerful. This jaguar patrols a home range of over 100 square kilometers in Brazil, deep in the heart of the worlds largest tropical rainforest.

programme.title: Lions: Africas Super Power
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, theyll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory.

programme.title: Big Cats of the Serengeti
programme.desc: Cameras reveal the last secrets of Africas largest wild lions by following two prides.

programme.title: Addos Elephants
programme.desc: Savannah elephants thrive in South Africas Addo Elephant National Park.

programme.title: Baboon Bandits
programme.desc: A close look at the Table Mountain baboons and the local reactions they incite.

programme.title: Equator
programme.desc: The Equator is not only the line that divides the Earth, it is also the evolutionary powerhouse of the world. See its effect on the Galapagos.

programme.title: Hidden Australia
programme.desc: Australia is known for its sun-kissed beaches, however the 2,500 miles between the coasts are made up of a patchwork of contrasting landscapes, such as tropical rainforests, snow-capped mountains, dry woodlands, tropical reefs, and hostile desert.

programme.title: Symphony of the Seas: Underwater Wonders of Australias Ocean
programme.desc: A cinematic dive with Paul Waghorn exploring Australias reefs, marine life, and survival.

programme.title: Lobsters: Knights of the Deep
programme.desc: The knights of the sea are armoured from head to toe and armed to the teeth, yet many of them face a bleak fate; a lot of lobsters end up on a plate; biologists are also fond of lobsters, but as a study object.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: The wolf is performing a spectacular come back in the mountains of Italy.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: The introduction of seven Slovenian bears, two males and five females, into the woods of Adamello, in Trentino.

programme.title: Wild Italy: Top Predators
programme.desc: Two eagles struggle to survive and produce offspring to maintain their species.

programme.title: Bear Essentials
programme.desc: We follow three young bears of different species - polar bears, brown bears and sloth bears (like Baloo, the Jungle Book Bear) - that inhabit dramatically varied landscapes as they find their way in the world. We look at how their mothers teach them the skills they need to survive and watch the many dangers they face.

programme.title: Conversations with Dolphins
programme.desc: An exploration of the link between humans and dolphins and why they are so interested in and curious about each other.

programme.title: Conversations with Dolphins
programme.desc: An exploration of dolphin research and how it has changed over the decades, including learning of the species intelligence.

programme.title: Coral Sea Dreaming
programme.desc: The filmmaker highlights the survival strategies of marine creatures in a coral, which is an underwater ecosystem characterised by reef-building.

programme.title: Cuttlefish - The Brainy Bunch
programme.desc: Cuttlefish, with 3 hearts and 10 arms, reveal brain secrets through their eyes and pyrotechnics.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew heads to an antiques shop in Edinburgh on a hunt for new stock and on an expedition to a 750-year-old house, he discovers an item that takes him out of his comfort zone.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: When architectural salvage hunter Drew Pritchard, and his sidekick Tee, get access to a recently-closed department store, he faces a potentially almighty shopping spree.

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Jenni Falconer is on hand to assist a couple searching for a liberating getaway in glorious and beautiful Tuscany.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: A definitive one-stop shop for all things cruise, bringing you the hottest destinations and the latest deals to ensure that your next cruise ship holiday is your greatest one yet.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson is tasked with helping a retired lecturer find some peace, tranquillity and creative inspiration in the countryside of Northumberland for a £200k budget. Jules also visits a centuries old castle to find about the rare historic treasures within the castle walls, as well as the prehistoric ones found roaming the grounds.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6
programme.desc: Since Dom and Brians heist in Rio they must live as fugitives. Meanwhile, Agent Hobbs has been tracking a gang of lethally skilled mercenary drivers. Hobbs asks Dom and his crew for help in exchange for full pardons for everyone.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto, Brian OConner and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw, Owens older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: As war with the Transformers rages on, inventor Cade Yeager forms an unlikely alliance with Bumblebee, an English lord and an Oxford professor to save the planet.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Journalist Eddie Brock is trying to take down Carlton Drake, the notorious and brilliant founder of the Life Foundation. While investigating one of Drakes experiments, Eddies body merges with the alien Venom -- leaving him with superhuman strength and power. Twisted, dark and fueled by rage, Venom tries to control the new and dangerous abilities that Eddie finds so intoxicating.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt and the IMF team race against time to find the Entity, a rogue artificial intelligence that can destroy mankind.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: On an earlier job, one of Charlie Crokers gang steals millions of dollars worth of gold from the rest, so they devise a brilliant and complex plan to steal the bullion back. This time theyre going to need a new safe cracker, and Charlie approaches the beautiful Stella, a safe expert who has never worked on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Twisters
programme.desc: Competing teams of storm chasers find themselves in a fight for their lives as multiple systems converge over central Oklahoma.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Monster Family 2
programme.desc: Baba Yaga and Renfield are captured by a monster hunter so the Wishbone family once again transform into a vampire Frankensteins monster a mummy and a werewolf in a bid to free them.

programme.title: Rock Dog

programme.title: Antz

programme.title: The Secret Life of Pets
programme.desc: A domesticated terrier and his unruly canine pal encounter a rebellious bunny and his gang of abandoned pets.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: The story of a reclusive green ogre called Shrek whose life of solitude is disrupted by a horde of refugees who have been banished by the evil Lord Farquaad. Determined to save his home, Shrek cuts a deal with the tyrant, who sets him a daunting task - if Shrek is ever to enjoy peace and quiet again, he must rescue Farquaads bride-to-be from a dangerous castle.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: Rebellious
programme.desc: A headstrong princess is stolen by an evil sorcerer, and her scholarly fiance must use his wits in an epic quest to find her while she boldly challenges her captors and plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Into the Wonderwoods

programme.title: Noahs Ark
programme.desc: A pair of mice, Vini and Tom, devise a plan to sneak onto Noahs Ark.

programme.title: Open Season 3
programme.desc: After Boog switches places with a circus bear, Elliott and the gang must rescue him before the circus returns home to Russia.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: The wife of a dentist convinces him to betray their new neighbour - a hit man turned informant - to the Chicago gangsters who want him dead. In need of money in order to hurry through a divorce, the young man arranges a meeting with the Mob in which he will exchange information for cash, but when his scheming wife tells the hit man what he is up to, it is the dentists life that is placed in grave danger.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Mahoney and friends have graduated from the Police Academy and are issued with their first assignments. As before, their cheerfulness and devotion to duty outweighs any shortcomings, but are they ready to do battle with a band of graffiti daubing terrorists?

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: An ordinary cabbie uses gadget-laden formal wear to combat a villain who wants to poison the worlds water supply.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A rich property developer wants to take over an exclusive country club and so challenges its pompous president to a game of golf leading to utter mayhem, and a stream of surreal and crude visual gags.

programme.title: Weird Science
programme.desc: Two high-school nerds accidentally create the woman of their dreams when an electrical storm zaps their home computer.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: Talladega Nights: The Ballad of Ricky Bobby
programme.desc: A champion NASCAR drivers cosy position alongside his best friend at the top of the championship is threatened by a flamboyant French newcomer. With his confidence shattered, the driver draws on the help of his father and some eccentric training techniques to claw his way back to the top.

programme.title: Team America: World Police
programme.desc: A gung-ho, `Thunderbirds-style squad of puppets lead Americas war on terrorism. The creators of `South Park go on the offensive with an outrageous animated satire that makes a target of everyone from politicians to Hollywood liberals.

programme.title: Superbad
programme.desc: Two inseparable best friends navigate the last weeks of high school and are invited to a gigantic house party. Together with their nerdy friend, they spend a long day trying to score enough alcohol to supply the party and inebriate two girls in order to kick-start their sex lives before they go off to college. Their quest is complicated after one of them falls in with two inept cops who are determined to show him a good time.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Chazz Michael Michaels and Jimmy MacElroy are the two titans of skating. At the Winter Olympics, the fierce rivals find themselves forced to share the winners podium when they both score gold. The shower of glory doesnt last for long, as the pair descend into fisticuffs and set the mascot on fire. Disgraced and stripped of their medals, they can get back on ice, but only if they dance with each other as a pair.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Jack Malik is a struggling singer-songwriter in an English seaside town whose dreams of fame are rapidly fading, despite the fierce devotion and support of his childhood best friend, Ellie. After a freak bus accident during a mysterious global blackout, Jack wakes up to discover that The Beatles have never existed. Performing songs by the greatest band in history to a world that has never heard them, Jack becomes on overnight sensation with a little help from his agent.

programme.title: Zoolander 2
programme.desc: A special agent recruits former models Derek Zoolander and Hansel to save the worlds most beautiful people from a deadly plot.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: The Hangover
programme.desc: A crazy Las Vegas bachelor party turns into a race against time when three hung-over groomsmen awaken after a night of drunken debauchery to find that the groom has gone missing, and attempt to get him to the alter in time for his wedding.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Coach Ken Carter, a controversial high school basketball coach who received national attention when he benched his undefeated team due to their collective poor academic record in 1999. In the face of much criticism, Carter fought to keep his methods, determined to show the boys that they need to rely on more than sports for their futures.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: Once the highly regarded composer to the Viennese Court, Salieri is now an old man, unknown and confined to an asylum. After a suicide attempt he recounts his story to a young cleric, going back 30 years to his heyday at the court of Emperor Joseph II, where he first met the young Mozart. Despite Salieris Machiavellian attempts to frustrate Mozarts progress, the great young composer attracts the favour of the Emperor.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: Young Liberian refugee Jacqueline barely escapes her war-torn country to settle on a Greek island. Her daily struggle for survival keeps terrible memories at bay, and she becomes close to an American tour guide.

programme.title: Jungleland
programme.desc: A reluctant bare-knuckle boxer and his manager brother must travel across the country for one last fight, but an unexpected travel companion exposes the cracks in their bond along the way.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Michael Oher is a poor and undereducated African-American teenager who lived all his life on the streets. His tremendous size and quickness makes him a perfect athlete and attracts the interest if a wealthy and conservative suburban family who take him in and groom him both athletically and academically.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: Black Dog
programme.desc: Released from jail, Lang returns to his hometown in Northwest China. As part of a dog patrol tasked with clearing stray dogs before the 2008 Olympics, he bonds with a black stray. The two lonely souls embark on a new journey together.

programme.title: Jungleland
programme.desc: A reluctant bare-knuckle boxer and his manager brother must travel across the country for one last fight, but an unexpected travel companion exposes the cracks in their bond along the way.

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: Young Liberian refugee Jacqueline barely escapes her war-torn country to settle on a Greek island. Her daily struggle for survival keeps terrible memories at bay, and she becomes close to an American tour guide.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: Ride On
programme.desc: Washed-up stuntman Luo seeks help from his estranged daughter and her lawyer boyfriend when his beloved stunt horse may be auctioned off to pay his debts. Luo and Red Hare become a media sensation when their fight with debt collectors goes viral.

programme.title: The Mountain
programme.desc: Raised outside of her M?ori culture, tween Sam sets out on a mission with two other misfits to reconnect with her tupuna: Taranaki Maunga. Together, the three go on an unconventional journey and discover the power of friendship.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Dracula, who operates a high-end resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the counts teen-aged daughter.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Concerned that his half-human grandson isnt showing his vampire side, Dracula and his friends put the boy through a `monster-in-training boot camp just as Dracs old-school father decides to pay a visit.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with plans for a fun-filled summer voyage on a monster cruise. As the pack starts enjoying colossal buffets and exotic excursions, Drac finds himself falling for the ships intriguing but dangerous captain. He soon learns that trying to balance family, friends and romance might just be too much to handle. even for the worlds most powerful vampire.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccups friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: In a parallel universe, young orphan Lyra Belacqua resides in Oxford under the patronage of her dashing adventurer Uncle, Lord Asriel. When Lyra comes into possession of an alethiometer, a compass that truthfully answers any question, there are people who will do anything to get hold of it, and Lyra finds herself on an epic quest to the frozen North to safeguard the future of her entire world.

programme.title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Heartwarming tale in which a ten-year-old boy befriends and shelters a gentle alien creature who has been stranded on Earth. When the authorities are alerted to this unusual house guest, the boy tries to help the creature return home before menacing government agents close in. The film won three Academy Awards for music, sound and special effects.

programme.title: Smurfs
programme.desc: When evil wizards Razamel and Gargamel take Papa Smurf, the Smurfs embark on a mission to the real world to save him. With help from some new friends, they must discover what defines their destiny to save the universe.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Concerned that his half-human grandson isnt showing his vampire side, Dracula and his friends put the boy through a `monster-in-training boot camp just as Dracs old-school father decides to pay a visit.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: A Monster Vacation
programme.desc: Mavis surprises Dracula with plans for a fun-filled summer voyage on a monster cruise. As the pack starts enjoying colossal buffets and exotic excursions, Drac finds himself falling for the ships intriguing but dangerous captain. He soon learns that trying to balance family, friends and romance might just be too much to handle. even for the worlds most powerful vampire.

programme.title: Bookworm
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old Mildreds world is turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, comes back to look after her and takes her camping to find the mythological Canterbury Panther.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Two adopted brothers and rival dancers are thrust together when they are both invited to audition for the World Breaking Championships.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: A soldier returns from Vietnam to find his boyhood friend, also a fellow soldier, in a military hospital, having suffered a mental breakdown in which he has become detached from reality and imagines that he is a bird.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A bittersweet story about a 43-year-old woman on the verge of divorce who magically travels back in time to her senior high-school years. She is able to act with the benefit of hindsight, but despite her efforts, she falls for the same boy all over again.

programme.title: The Big Heat
programme.desc: An honest policeman is determined to bust police corruption and the stranglehold of the Mafia. At first he innocently begins investigating the Mafia-related killing of a fellow officer, but things turn nasty when his wife is killed in a car bomb blast meant for him, his child is threatened with kidnapping and he loses his job.

programme.title: Breakdown
programme.desc: Jeff Taylor and his wife Amy are moving to California, and decide to ride across the country. After the car breaks down in the desert, Amy accepts a ride from passing trucker Red to get help. After hours she hasnt returned, and Jeff makes his own way to the nearby diner she was heading for. Nobody there has seen her - not even the trucker who picked her up.

programme.title: ...And Justice for All
programme.desc: Satirical drama in which an idealistic lawyer who tries to win cases for clients trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system finds himself defending a venal and self-righteous judge accused of rape. The judge wrongly assumes the lawyers ideals and disdain for the courts will drive him to get an acquittal, despite the evidence and the loathing they have for each other.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: Sweeping epic about three sons raised on a Montana ranch by their father, a colonel who has turned his back on the army after the Indian Wars. Though the destinies of the boys are very different, two forces impact on each of their lives: the Great War in Europe and the love of a young woman. Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: A gutsy prisoner earns the admiration of inmates and the wrath of guards by constant defiance and bids for freedom.

programme.title: Full Metal Jacket
programme.desc: A US Marine observes the effects the Vietnam War has on his fellow Marines from their brutal basic training to the bloody street fighting in Hue, Vietnam.

programme.title: The Shawshank Redemption
programme.desc: Andy Dufresne and Ellis Boyd `Red Redding are two prisoners serving long sentences in the vicious Shawshank jail. The two come to terms with their imprisonment while surviving the sadistic acts of prison warden Samuel Norton, and for both, a different sort of redemption awaits.

programme.title: Against All Odds
programme.desc: A fading professional football player falls in love with the girlfriend of a small-time criminal hes been hired to find.

programme.title: The Big Heat
programme.desc: An honest policeman is determined to bust police corruption and the stranglehold of the Mafia. At first he innocently begins investigating the Mafia-related killing of a fellow officer, but things turn nasty when his wife is killed in a car bomb blast meant for him, his child is threatened with kidnapping and he loses his job.

Nobody there has seen her - not even the trucker who picked her up.

programme.desc: Not sure what to watch next? Then discover some of the greatest British Sky Originals. From Four Kids and It to SAS Red Notice, theres something here for everyone.

programme.desc: Escaped convict Jeffrey Manchester hides out in a Toys "R" Us, surviving undetected for months while planning his next move. However, his double life starts to unravel when he falls for a divorced mum, setting off a compelling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Caught Stealing
programme.desc: When his punk-rock neighbour asks him to take care of his cat for a few days, New York City bartender Hank Thompson suddenly finds himself caught in the middle of a motley crew of threatening gangsters who all want a piece of him.

programme.title: Flavia
programme.desc: Flavia de Luce, an 11-year-old amateur sleuth, investigates a murder at her familys manor house when her father falls under suspicion. Starring Martin Freeman and Jonathan Pryce. (2026)

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi and Horror HD.uk
programme.title: 10 Cloverfield Lane
programme.desc: A woman discovers the horrifying truth about the outside world while living in an underground shelter with two men.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: A group of explorers make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.

programme.title: 47 Meters Down
programme.desc: Two sisters vacationing in Mexico become trapped in a shark cage on the ocean floor. As their oxygen starts to run out and with great white sharks circling them, the sisters must find a way to get to the surface alive.

programme.title: Beast of War
programme.desc: During World War II, a Japanese fighter sinks an Australian warship in the Timor Sea. Clinging to a makeshift raft, a handful of soldiers soon find themselves in a desperate fight for survival as a great white shark circles in the water.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielbergs 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: When five friends cause a deadly car accident, they cover up their involvement and keep it a secret rather than face the consequences. One year later, they find themselves stalked by a mysterious killer who knows what they did last summer.

programme.title: IT

Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Global pop sensation Skye Riley begins to experience increasingly terrifying and inexplicable events. Overwhelmed by the escalating horrors and pressures of fame, she must face her dark past to regain control of her life.

programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. programme.title: Heroes of World War II
programme.desc: The story of Ewen Montagu, who devised a cunning deception whereby the body of a dead officer was purposely washed ashore in Spain with false information about Allied landings in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Hitlers World: The Post-War Plan
programme.desc: Adolf Hitlers aspirations were truly global. Hear about the Nazis plans to invade America - and the surprising support for National Socialism in the land of the free.

programme.title: WWII: Battles Won and Lost
programme.desc: Some words transcend their origins as simple names, and are carved into history as turning points- El Alameine, Okinawa, Pearl Harbor; Japan attacks the United States naval base at Pearl Harbour, and prompts America to enter World War II.

programme.title: Hiroshima
programme.desc: The aftermath of the nuclear attack on Hiroshima and the unbearable suffering that was brought to the civilians.

programme.title: Upstairs, Downstairs
programme.desc: Its November 1907 and, following Emily the maids suicide, Mrs Bridges has begun to act rather strangely. She finally breaks down, stealing a baby on the eve of an important dinner party, and its up to the toffs and Hudson to save the day - after all, good cooks are hard to come by.

programme.title: Love Your Garden

Alan and his team of experts turn Roisins dangerous sloping garden into a stunning music festival-inspired haven.

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Marcus makes plans to expand the smallholdings herb patch. A trip to Gloucestershire to see the UKs largest herb collection shows that even someone as experienced as Marcus can still learn a lot about ingredients.

programme.title: Marcus Wareings Tales from a Kitchen Garden
programme.desc: Marcus develops plans to create a orchard and bring in the perfect eating apple for his favourite dessert, the classic tarte Tatin. A trip to Kent introduces him to the wide range of heritage apples available in the UK, as well as giving him some tips and tricks on how to grow his own. Back at the farm, he gets a lesson on attracting pollinators, and discovers there is a whole world of edible flowers. He also cooks up some incredible Indian-style chutneys with a glut from the kitchen garden.

The uneven back portion is an eyesore, and they dislike the straight, purposeless path.

programme.title: Permissive
programme.desc: Suzy arrives in London with nowhere to stay. She meets a friend, Fiona, a groupie who has settled into a relationship with Lee, bass player and singer with a rock-band.

programme.title: Can You Keep It Up for a Week?
programme.desc: Annette promises to marry her boyfriend Gil, only if he keeps his hands off other women and holds down a proper job for seven days.

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: Collectors arrive at the auction house hoping to buy Oasis lyrics hand-written by Noel for his brother Liam. A prized work by British sculptor Anish Kapoor and some vintage luxury Louis Vuitton luggage also go under the hammer.

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: A guitar amp used by Jimi Hendrix draws in collectors and dealers. An ornate chair complete with pagan carvings sparks a bidding war. Theres also a bizarre hoard of celebrity hair. And a vintage travel trunk from the 1930s goes under the hammer.

programme.title: Flipping Profit
programme.desc: Fine art expert Kate Bliss, top trader Linda Lambert and master upholsterer Anthony Devine head to Monmouth and compete by scouring its antique shops, scrap yards and flea markets to find any items that will make them a huge profit.

programme.title: The Truth About
programme.desc: Englands third goal in the World Cup final of 1966 has been one of the most controversial in the history of football. The United States assembled the greatest collection of basketball talents on the planet for the 1992 Olympic Games.

programme.title: The Truth About

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Luke and his team have been called to a farm in Donnybrook in Western Australia where a 20-tonne excavator AKA The Mud Monster is bogged. The owner was trying to build a recreational dam when the machine got stuck. The Mud Monster has been out of action for months now, burning money and holding up construction. Two other salvage companies have tried to remove it and failed. Team Salvage has just 24-hours and a 5,000-dollar budget to get it done.

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers: Mums Know Best

programme.desc: Luke and his team have been contracted to remove two stolen vehicles from an abandoned mine site. The mine site has been turned into a recreational lake for weekend campers and water skiers. The missing cars are toxic and need to be removed. They have a 15,000-dollar budget and two days to get the job done. But there are problems: the location of the cars is unknown and the lake is overrun with holidaymakers. Theyll need to employ commercial divers to search for the missing vehicles.

programme.title: Classic Holby City

programme.title: Classic Casualty
programme.desc: Mads comes face to face with the taxi driver who assaulted her, and nurse Linda Andrews returns to join the overworked ED team.

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Continuing the story of Eddie and Rosies showdown. The C.I.D. realise that both Santini and Fox are in trouble.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Patrick and Liz have a difficult time. When Roxy asks her Mum to do a shift behind the bar its the last straw for Peggy, who announces shes moving out.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Stacey reels from the news that Ryan kissed her for a bet. Wandering around the Square in shock, she ends up in the park, where she doubles over in pain.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: Siegfried treats Captain Crawfords sick horse and James treats Arnie Braithwaites dog, who may have diabetes.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: Doctor Blake is called to a Patrick Tynemans shoe factory where a migrant worker has died using one of the machines. Initially it looks like an industrial accident, but when Blake investigates more closely he begins to suspect foul play.

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Hetty represents a neighbour at a creditors meeting, and the Wainthropp Detective Agency is asked to find a missing company director and his money.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharons decision to give the cafe a Jewish theme backfires, and she finds herself ostracised by the Greek community.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: When Compo hauls a piece of antique silver from the canal, Seymour believes he can recover the rest of the loot and return it to its rightful owner. Could this be his passport into the county set?

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: An afternoon driving around in Wesleys car proves to be hard on the old feet.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Clegg and Seymour attempt the impossible and try to get the hospitalised Clem Hemingway to crack a smile.

programme.title: Queens of Mystery
programme.desc: A raven feather replaces an Edgar Allan Poe manuscript stolen before its sale; when Jane finds a body hidden in the museum, the theft investigation switches to a murder case.

programme.title: Bergerac
programme.desc: Relations between Bergerac and Barney reach breaking point as the hunt for the killer intensifies. Meanwhile, Ruth visits Monica to explore her suspicions.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: UCOS pursue a serial rapist when a recent assault at a bakery is linked to two attacks at a chocolate factory ten years previously. However, Duncan Millers chocolate factory hides many dark secrets, and the team find themselves with more cases than they bargained for.

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: Dalziel visits a quiet village pub and finds himself the hostage of the landlord, a Falklands veteran whose marriage is falling apart.

programme.desc: A French student suffering from food poisoning collapses and Mal and Mel discover she is pregnant. Vivien has decided to tell everyone about her rape.

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Lucy plays a dangerous game with Adam but is caught red-handed by Ian.

programme.title: All Creatures Great and Small
programme.desc: James says he wants to build a tennis court in the garden and Rosie decides she would like to be a vet and accompanies her dad on his rounds, but James seems less than enthusiastic at the prospect.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries
programme.desc: Doctor Lucien Blake finds himself on the judging panel for the Begonia Festival. When one of his fellow judges is found dead, the prime suspects are the head of the judging panel, Charles Griffith and his rough-hewn local rival Nick Manos.

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Hetty is called in to investigate when her nephew is suspended from school for supposedly misbehaving.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey organises a meeting of Prisoners Wives and Sharon gets more involved than she expected. Meanwhile, the ever-lusty Dorien has fallen for Stanley, a missionary student.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Seymour and Clegg plan to make aeronautical history with a pair of old roller skates, an old sail and a very gullible test pilot.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.sub-title: When You Take a Good Bite, Yorkshire Tastes Terrible
programme.desc: Clegg takes Compo and Seymour on a sentimental journey to re-create the times when his old school chums would walk gates and climb trees together. As we all know, nostalgia can be a dodgy old thing.

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: The things some people have to do to get a drink out of someone! Seymour and Clegg take drastic action to try to get Compo to buy a round.

programme.title: This is not a murder mystery
programme.desc: England, 1936. A group of young surrealist artists gathers at the impressive West Dean estate for a private exhibition. When a shocking murder occurs, Scotland Yard is called in.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A new musical director for the bell-ringers of St Marys leads to discord, disharmony and the blood-curdling sound of murder.

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: UCOS reinvestigate the disappearance of five-year-old Yasser Blackledge 25 years ago when a recently released prisoner, John Davies, confesses to his abduction and murder. The team are suspicious of Davies motives for the admission so soon after being granted parole, and far from treating it as an open and shut case they decide to take a closer look at Yassers estranged parents.

programme.title: Dalziel and Pascoe
programme.desc: When a young clubber is found dead, the crime-fighting duo are under pressure to find out who might have dealt the drugs which evidently killed him. They start to scrutinise the boys social circle and are keen to discover the identities of the young man and woman photographed in a suggestive pose on the clubs flyers.

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Hetty is called in to investigate when her nephew is suspended from school for supposedly misbehaving.

programme.title: Whitstable Pearl
programme.desc: Pearl longs for Charlie, while Mike feels Pearls absence deeply. However, a death at a wedding intertwines their paths once again as Pearl becomes a witness to family feuds, resentful ex-girlfriends, and lies.

programme.title: Englands Forgotten Queen: The Life and Death of Lady Jane Grey
programme.desc: Jane has been installed in the Tower of London by a powerful cabal of men in the royal court. They want to keep the Catholic Mary Tudor from power. Meanwhile, Mary has assembled an army and is ready to fight back.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish railway journey reaches Aberdeen. From the Granite City, Michael heads straight out to a dramatic piece of coastline 18 miles to its north.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo crosses the Culloden Viaduct aboard the Caledonian Sleeper to arrive bright and early in the coastal city of Inverness, from which he heads north on a magnificent scenic adventure to the Orkney archipelago.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Joanna Lumleys Silk Road Adventure
programme.desc: Starting in Venice Joanna sees how the travels of Venetian hero Marco Polo and Silk Road traders influenced its growth. In Albania, Joanna walks the beginning of the Via Egnatia - an ancient network that once linked the entirety of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Joanna Lumleys Silk Road
programme.desc: Joanna follows the Silk Road from the Black Sea to the Caspian Sea, across the post-Soviet states of Georgia and Azerbaijan. On the way she learns not only about the history, but how these two very countries are still finding their identities.

programme.title: Joanna Lumleys Silk Road
programme.desc: Joannas Silk Road journey takes her to Iran. Throughout the country she meets people eager to share the culture and innovations of the Persian civilisation which, thanks to the Silk Road, spread far beyond modern-day Iran.

programme.title: Joanna Lumleys Silk Road
programme.desc: As Joannas Silk Road Adventure draws to a close, she travels across the stunning yet little-known Central Asian states of Uzbekistan and Kyrgyzstan. Starting in the Kyzl-Kum desert she explores the Silk Road citadel of Khiva, a town infamous for its history of slavery. In the capital, Tashkent, she marvels at the splendid Soviet-built Metro system and attends a high society wedding as the guest of a famous pop star.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: When the Kaled dome is destroyed by the Thals rocket, the war appears to be over and the Thals rejoice at their victory. However, the Daleks then appear and a bloody massacre begins.

programme.desc: With Harry and Sarah Jane as his prisoners, Davros interrogates the Doctor, forcing him to reveal the future of the Daleks so that he can learn from their defeats to make them stronger.

programme.desc: The Kaled scientific elite move to prevent the development of the Daleks, while the Doctor prepares to destroy his old enemies forever. However, its unknown if he is already too late.

programme.desc: The Doctor leads a revolt of human slaves on Metebelis 3, ruled by giant spiders.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Beginning on the Moray Firth, Michael admires the impressive Cullen viaduct before enjoying a bowl of Cullen skink at a family-run fishmonger of 150 years standing. Heading west along the firth, Michael reaches Forres Station and the seaside village of Findhorn, where he meets members of an eco-community founded in the 1960s. At the Findhorn Foundation, Michael discovers spiritual energy, sacred dancing and a history of very large vegetables.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish coastal railway journey reaches Invergordon on the Cromarty Firth, the third great inlet on the northeast coast of the Highlands.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: At the end of the Second World War, British troops are confronted with the true horrors of Nazi crimes when they discover Bergen Belsen concentration camp.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: As the Cold War escalates, most Nazi hunting is abandoned. Suddenly, Nazis are able to return to normal life or find refuge overseas. Thousands begin new lives in South America.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: In the 1960s and 70s, the Second World War is a distant memory, but a few diehards are determined to hunt down thousands of Nazi war criminals. Many of whom are living in plain sight.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Replaced at work by a box, Victor embarks on his enforced retirement. As an erstwhile security officer, he finds it exasperatingly difficult to adapt to this directionless new existence, and he begins magnifying mundane aspects of everyday life into major dramas.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Margaret tries to help her husband cope with early retirement by getting him a book from the library entitled `Coping with Old Age. Maybe keep-fit classes at the local adult education centre will help take Victors mind off the depressing turn of events?

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Sardonic Victors life continues to be a trial - someone paints graffiti on the side of his house and the central heating system is making a deafening noise. To add to that theres a nasty smell coming from the living-room.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor is convinced he is going insane after being trapped in a shed by a swarm of bees, he is stuck in the opticians for a day with his eyes shut, and then left to babysit some unruly children.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Victor takes up drawing at a life class, but Margarets enthusiasm for his new hobby wanes when she discovers that he has given the model a lift home.

programme.desc: An artistic dispute with the Meldrews threatens to scupper Patricks plans for a quiet birthday, and Pippa finds herself in an adulterous affair.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team head to Enfield where they meet Eric Rivers, a keen sportsman who is gradually being deprived of the use of his body by motor neurone disease. Eric is a passionate communicator and a keen advocate for the value of life. Eric, his wife Davina and their three daughters need their terraced house adapted for Erics needs. They also need additional room.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY team head to Dumfries in Scotland to meet Sue, whose partner Barry died of a sudden heart attack in 2003, leaving her suffering from depression, dealing with two young children and living in a house that was falling apart. The team enlist the aid of their very own tartan army to tackle this build and try to help get this family back on track.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the team join forces with an army of local tradespeople to come to the aid of a family in Dudley. All three children in the Whitehouse family have an inherited condition called Fragile X Syndrome. The symptoms vary, but their youngest son has been hit hardest and has learning difficulties. Dad Wayne and mum Joanne attempted to build an extension to their house to try and cope.

programme.desc: Katie meets Whitley, who was convicted of killing her brother after an argument. Whitley claims it was self-defence, but Katie learns she left the house and came back with a gun.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: The Smith family embark upon a mammoth declutter. Stacey and the team challenge them to let go of half of their possessions, so that they can beautifully reorganise their life and home. Two years ago, Raaj, her husband Roydel and their toddler son, Ajay, moved in with their two nieces, Simran and Harjoth, and nephew Gurkeerat when their mum (Raajs sister) passed away after contracting Covid.

programme.desc: Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team travel to Duxford near Cambridge. Joshuas cancer meant the extension had to be abandoned just when it became more necessary than ever.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: After 20 years serving his country, Royal Engineer and Paratrooper Mo Morris was given a medical discharge. He has been left struggling to walk in a home which is totally unsuitable to his needs. Nick Knowles and the DIY SOS team come to his rescue.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick Knowles and team head to Halifax to help a family whose eight-year-old son Josh is paralysed and can only access two rooms in the house. The family home needs a major overhaul and the DIY SOS Team have just nine days to pull it off.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete helps a withdrawn pregnant Malinois regain strength so she can care for her 11 lively pups, and falls for Winter, a Staffie who is covered in scars.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: Hayley has always wanted children but shes been anxious since her 20-week scan, which revealed that her baby has a congenital diaphragmatic hernia, an extremely rare type of hernia that occurs in one in 2,200 births. Until the baby is born its relatively safe but once its born it has to breathe for itself and thats when it is most vulnerable.

programme.title: One Born Every Minute
programme.desc: One expectant couple have faith beyond the hospital staff, while another dad-to-be is in danger of missing out on the big moment.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Its chaos for the junior doctors when the hospital computer system crashes. Zak treats a man who may have had a mini stroke, and Tej deals with two critically ill patients in resus.

programme.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
programme.desc: Zak treats a 90-year-old woman after paramedics gave her CPR, Tristan gets a diagnosis spot-on, and Christine has a patient with an alarming combination of symptoms.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: Working mum Toyah, US-born dad Ron, and their three kids, moved from a big house in the US into a much smaller house in the UK. Unfortunately, they forgot to downsize their possessions and are now stuck in a home that doesnt serve its purpose.

programme.title: Louis Theroux Interviews...
programme.desc: Louis spends time with global popstar Rita Ora. After being plucked from obscurity by Jay-Zs Roc Nation label, Rita has gone on to forge a career as an all-round entertainer, embracing acting roles, lucrative advertising contracts and stints as a TV talent show judge, all while racking up more top ten hits than any other British female singer.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael ventures beyond Europe to the Holy Land. His journey begins in Haifa in modern day Israel. Struck by the spectacular shrine of the Bahai and its beautiful gardens on the slopes of Mount Carmel, Michael learns about the faith.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: How did the Black Death change Britain? Lucy Worsley examines the latest science, and explores how the huge death toll affected religious beliefs, class structure, work and women.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A 90s Alfa with electrical issues lives up to its stereotype and the team revisit a road roller, four years on. They also tackle a French motoring icon, the Citroen 2CV6 Dolly.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The Restoring Classics team take Dereks advice when he sniffs out the rarest car theyve ever taken on - the last remaining Hillman GT.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: As the net closes upon Berlin, Hitler retreats to an underground bunker and with his officers faces the end of the Reich.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: An in-depth exploration of the assassination of one of the main architects of the Holocaust, Reinhard Heydrich, by British-trained Czechs.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow pays a final visit to Ebrington Square in Derry/Londonderry, where treasures include a statue from Java, Olympic boxing memorabilia and dazzling jewellery from the 1960s.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow pays a final visit to Swanage Pier in Dorset, where treasures include shipwreck finds, a jewel encrusted bird, an early folding bike and a pair of aviator boots with a link to a tragic wartime mission.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A near-perfect 50s Chevy panel van and a very desirable low-mileage 80s Brooklands Capri tempt auctioneer Derek out of Yorkshire.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: The team struggles to explain how a DAF 33 gearbox works, and office manager Sarah attempts to bring order to the auto memorabilia sale.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: As the net closes upon Berlin, Hitler retreats to an underground bunker and with his officers faces the end of the Reich.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: An in-depth exploration of the assassination of one of the main architects of the Holocaust, Reinhard Heydrich, by British-trained Czechs.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Revealing the extraordinary riches and wonders of the polar regions that have kept people visiting them for thousands of years. Today, their survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting-edge science. Most Arctic people live in Siberia, either in cities like Norilsk - the coldest city on earth - or out on the tundra, where tribes like the Dogan survive by herding reindeer.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Revealing the extraordinary riches and wonders of the polar regions that have kept people visiting them for thousands of years. Today, their survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting-edge science. Most Arctic people live in Siberia, either in cities like Norilsk - the coldest city on earth - or out on the tundra, where tribes like the Dogan survive by herding reindeer.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Kevin and Kieran lead a convoy moving three high-speed trains from Japan, while Colin and Sam have 24 hours to move a 73-tonne steam locomotive from World War II.

programme.title: Trawlermen: Hunting the Catch
programme.desc: Off the coast of Yorkshire, Siwrengale is heading out for the beginning of the North Sea whelk season. Skipper Darren Warters is on the hunt with sons Regan and Lewis. Asian demand has created a lucrative fishery in this small patch of the North Sea, but winter storms have badly damaged their pots. Miles of rope must be untangled before they can begin fishing in earnest. South east of Shetland is Long Hole - the deepest waters in the North Sea.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: The filmmaker sheds light on the flora and fauna of the diverse terrains of Earth, while also analysing how wildlife survives in extreme environments.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: Between the tropics and the frozen poles lies a region dominated by relentless change in the form of the four seasons: spring, summer, autumn and winter. Each one presents plants with huge challenges, from ice and snow to raging fires, from intense competition to surprising enemies. This is a world of astonishing variety and vibrant colour. To survive here plants must use strategy, deception and remarkable feats of engineering. Most importantly, they must get their timing right.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will benefit from an owners decision that his broken vehicle is beyond repair, and secure a Mercedes 190 investment that they hope to restore.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Welcome to the series that restores and makes a profit from your unwanted items. In this episode, Simon leads Henry to a barn that features an amazing collection of replica Rolls Royce cars, while Henry tries his hand at driving a tractor.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: The newest, biggest boat in the fleet, the Chris Andra, sets off on her maiden voyage, but the hunt for a shoal of migrating mackerel is far from plain sailing for skipper Willie Tait and his co-skipper and cousin, Peter. Meanwhile, on the trawler Renown skipper James Buchan is practising a form of fishing dating back almost 200 years.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Lifelong friends and skippers, Jimmy Buchan and Sandy Watt, take stock of the human cost of one of the most dangerous occupations known to mankind. As Jimmys trawler Amity lands a hefty catch of prawns, he comes to terms with his fears for the safety of his own life and those of his crew. Meanwhile, Sandys young apprentice John Duncan Campbell gets the chance hes been waiting for.
