programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Bradshaws 1913 Continental Railway Guide in hand, Michael Portillo travels east through the Balkans - the powder keg of Europe - along the most exotic section of the Orient Express. His destination is Istanbul, known a century ago as Constantinople, a multi-ethnic city where Europe and Asia meet - via an underground railway.

programme.title: Lucy Worsley Investigates
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley uncovers the story of the two boys whose disappearance in 1483 has led to centuries of mystery and speculation.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team lift the shutters on their biggest restoration to date in the shape of a Series 1 Land Rover.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team fly the flag for King and country with one of their most luxurious purchases to date - a 1981 Rolls Royce Silver Spirit.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Japan had entered the war confident that superior spiritual strength and discipline would prevail. By 1944, they were fighting for survival, crippled by shortages of food, metals and fuel. After massive defeats at Saipan, Iwo Jima and Okinawa, a continuous campaign of Allied bombing kills 250,000 and leaves eight million homeless.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: By 1960, one of the worlds most notorious Nazi war criminals, Adolf Eichmann, is living incognito with his family on the outskirts of Buenos Aires under the alias Ricardo Klement. Known as the architect of Hitlers `Final Solution and directly culpable for the murder of six millions Jews, the former Lieutenant Colonel of the SS is now himself a hunted man.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow pays a final visit to Alexandra Gardens in Cardiff, where treasures include a rare Welsh rugby shirt, colourful cameo glass and unseen photos of The Rolling Stones. Mark Hill is excited to see a poster and a collection of unpublished photos documenting one of The Rolling Stones first concerts, while Joanna Hardy is delighted to see a repurposed piece of silver jewellery from India.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce is in Normandy for a special edition of the roadshow to commemorate the 80th anniversary of the D-Day landings in June 1944. Filmed in Normandy and at the D-Day Museum in Portsmouth, the team hear eyewitness accounts from the time.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Anglophile Derek struggles to get his message across on a rare trip abroad to pick up a Bentley, while a well-restored Ford XR2 sets the auction alight.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer.

programme.title: World at War
programme.desc: Japan had entered the war confident that superior spiritual strength and discipline would prevail. programme.title: Frozen Planet II
programme.desc: Exploring the wildlife found in the worlds coldest regions: the Arctic and Antarctic, high mountains, frozen deserts, snowbound forests, and ice-cold oceans. Each species must overcome a unique set of challenges to endure its extreme environment.

programme.desc: Exploring the wildlife found in the worlds coldest regions: the Arctic and Antarctic, high mountains, frozen deserts, snowbound forests, and ice-cold oceans. Each species must overcome a unique set of challenges to endure its extreme environment.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek has to extract a vintage car from its bizarre resting place, while Charlie picks up a Vauxhall Viva from a man who has owned it for over half a century.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Up for sale at the Mathewsons auction is a 1275 Mini GT thats come from just down the road and could be a future British icon.

programme.title: Resto My Ride
programme.sub-title: Were Going to Bash This Holden
programme.desc: Sam commits the crew to restoring an HR Holden she wants to drive from Melbourne to Darwin in the charity Variety Bash; with only three weeks to get the car ready.

programme.title: The Green Planet
programme.desc: Deserts are hostile: temperatures soar, and water is rare. Desert plants spend decades in suspended animation waiting for rain, or they travel to find it. They survive using weapons, camouflage, and surprising alliances with animals.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will find an old Alfa 155 in a barn, which is entirely original. The price seems good too, but on taking a second look, the undercarriage of the vehicle appears to be in a sorry state.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The boys are in York, where Henry struggles to squeeze into some motorcycle leathers and Simon gets into deep water when he tries to restore an aluminium boat.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Force 11 storms are expected but one young skipper has a point to prove to his dad.

programme.title: Trawlermen
programme.desc: Father and son team Charlie and Charles McBride have a disastrous week on their boat the Arcane when they lose their best fishing net, their boat loses power and they are driven into port. With massive debts, they have no choice but to attempt to retrieve the net from the bottom of the North Sea. Also, on the Amity, Jimmy Buchan has money worries too as boat maintenance sets him back £70,000.

programme.title: Jaisi Karni Waisi Bharni

programme.title: Betaab
programme.desc: A young man and woman fall in love, but face obstacles from their families. How will the drama unfold?

programme.title: Made in China
programme.desc: A failed businessman goes to China with a special business plan.

programme.title: Chak De India
programme.desc: After failing to score the winning goal, Kabir Khan, Captain of the Mens Hockey Team is blamed for the teams loss and fired. Years later he is given a chance to salvage his reputation, when he is offered the position as coach of the Womens Hockey Team.
